FFastbooks

Accounting software for Indian businesses that prepares sales, purchase, expense and bank entries from everyday inputs for accountant review.

Capabilities

  • GST accounting software
  • GST billing software
  • Bank reconciliation software
  • WhatsApp accounting
  • Inventory accounting software
  • Mobile accounting app
